chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1548 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge HEARING OF CASE For hearing of main case 09-10-2025 Mr. Ghulam Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This petition is filed with the grievance that the application of the petitioner for issuance of sale certificate of his landed property is pending before respondent No.3 and the same is not being decided. Learned AAG submits that the respondent No.3 is bound by law to decide such application. Under the circumstances, we dispose of this petition by directing the respondent No.3 to decide the application (available at page-29 of the main petition) within thirty days in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
